title: globba × intermedia
intro: Globba × intermedia, also known as Kaempferia parviflora or Galangal, is a type of plant that belongs to the Zingiberaceae family. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Globba × intermedia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood sugar levels, and act as a natural remedy for fever and headaches. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
